column1: MOODLE LMS — FULL CATEGORY & COURSE STRUCTURE

column3: Foundation training for anyone entering the workforce: how to find work, behave professionally, stay safe, and manage your money.
column6: Skills for finding, applying for, and succeeding in your first professional role.
column10: Write a strong CV, prepare for interviews, build a professional network, and present yourself as a confident, job-ready candidate.
Learn the unwritten rules of professional workplaces: punctuality, dress code, email etiquette, office behaviour, and building a professional reputation.

column6: Essential health and safety knowledge for construction, manufacturing, service, and office environments.
column10: Learn hazard identification, risk assessment, PPE, fire safety, and first aid basics required for safe workplaces.

column6: Personal money management skills for young professionals starting their earning journey.
column10: Learn to budget your salary, save consistently, avoid debt traps, and plan for your financial future from your very first paycheck.
